title: coriariaceae
intro: The Coriariaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, consisting of about 12 to 15 species of tropical trees and shrubs, commonly found in Central and South America, as well as parts of Asia. This family is primarily characterized by its distinctive fruit, which has a single seed and a fleshy, edible pulp. The Coriariaceae family is known for its unique characteristics, such as the fruit's ability to change color from green to yellow or red when ripe. The plants within this family are often used for their edible fruits, medicinal properties, and as ornamental species.
